items.summary: A practical checklist and spec for making any website work for AI agents. Criteria, examples, failure modes, and a maturity model — from scrape-only to agent-native.
items.content_text: A practical checklist and spec for making any website work for AI agents. Criteria, examples, failure modes, and a maturity model — from scrape-only to agent-native.

items.title: Claude Haiku 4.5
items.summary: Anthropic's fastest and most cost-efficient model. Matches Claude Sonnet 4's performance on coding and agent tasks while being dramatically faster and cheaper.
items.content_text: Anthropic's fastest and most cost-efficient model. Matches Claude Sonnet 4's performance on coding and agent tasks while being dramatically faster and cheaper.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6
items.summary: Anthropic's most capable model and the first Opus-class model with a 1M token context window. Leads on coding benchmarks with 80.8% SWE-bench. Internal codename "Fennec."
items.content_text: Anthropic's most capable model and the first Opus-class model with a 1M token context window. Leads on coding benchmarks with 80.8% SWE-bench. Internal codename "Fennec."

items.title: Claude Sonnet 4.6
items.summary: The first Sonnet model preferred over a previous Opus in coding evaluations. Excellent balance of speed, quality, and cost with a full 1M token context window.
items.content_text: The first Sonnet model preferred over a previous Opus in coding evaluations. Excellent balance of speed, quality, and cost with a full 1M token context window.

items.title: Cohere Tiny Aya 3.35B
items.summary: Multilingual specialist supporting 70+ languages at only 3.35B parameters. Designed for laptop and edge deployment. CC-BY-NC license.
items.content_text: Multilingual specialist supporting 70+ languages at only 3.35B parameters. Designed for laptop and edge deployment. CC-BY-NC license.

items.title: Command R+
items.summary: Cohere's flagship model purpose-built for enterprise RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Excels at grounded generation with citations, multi-step tool use, and structured outputs. Strong bilingual English/French support.
items.content_text: Cohere's flagship model purpose-built for enterprise RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Excels at grounded generation with citations, multi-step tool use, and structured outputs. Strong bilingual English/French support.

items.title: DeepSeek R1
items.summary: Powerful open-source reasoning model that exceeds OpenAI o1 on AIME and MATH benchmarks. Transparent chain-of-thought reasoning at extremely low cost. MIT license. Updated with R1-0528 in May 2025.
items.content_text: Powerful open-source reasoning model that exceeds OpenAI o1 on AIME and MATH benchmarks. Transparent chain-of-thought reasoning at extremely low cost. MIT license. Updated with R1-0528 in May 2025.

items.title: DeepSeek V3.2
items.summary: On par with GPT-5.1 and Gemini 3.0 Pro on benchmarks. Uses sparse attention for efficiency. MIT license. Dramatically cheaper than Western alternatives.
items.content_text: On par with GPT-5.1 and Gemini 3.0 Pro on benchmarks. Uses sparse attention for efficiency. MIT license. Dramatically cheaper than Western alternatives.

items.title: Falcon 3
items.summary: Runs on regular (non-gaming) laptops. Designed for accessibility and low-resource deployment. From UAE-based Technology Innovation Institute.
items.content_text: Runs on regular (non-gaming) laptops. Designed for accessibility and low-resource deployment. From UAE-based Technology Innovation Institute.

items.title: Gemini 3 Flash
items.summary: Google's fast, cost-efficient model replacing Gemini 2.5 Flash. Designed for high-throughput applications with up to 1M token context at an extremely low price.
items.content_text: Google's fast, cost-efficient model replacing Gemini 2.5 Flash. Designed for high-throughput applications with up to 1M token context at an extremely low price.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro
items.summary: Google's most capable model, building on the Gemini 3 series with improved reasoning, multimodal, and agentic capabilities. Native multimodal across text, images, video, and audio.
items.content_text: Google's most capable model, building on the Gemini 3 series with improved reasoning, multimodal, and agentic capabilities. Native multimodal across text, images, video, and audio.

items.title: Gemma 3
items.summary: Google's open model family optimized for on-device and edge deployment. Multimodal from 4B parameters. Sizes from 1B to 27B.
items.content_text: Google's open model family optimized for on-device and edge deployment. Multimodal from 4B parameters. Sizes from 1B to 27B.

items.title: Gemma 4
items.summary: Google's most capable open model, built from the same research as Gemini 3. The 31B dense variant ranks #3 on Arena AI (1,452 Elo). First Gemma release under Apache 2.0. Four variants from edge (E2B) to workstation (31B). Natively multimodal with 140+ language support.
items.content_text: Google's most capable open model, built from the same research as Gemini 3. The 31B dense variant ranks #3 on Arena AI (1,452 Elo). First Gemma release under Apache 2.0. Four variants from edge (E2B) to workstation (31B). Natively multimodal with 140+ language support.

items.title: GLM-5
items.summary: Large MoE model with strongest coding benchmark among open models (77.8% SWE-bench). 50.4% on Humanity's Last Exam. MIT license with no usage restrictions.
items.content_text: Large MoE model with strongest coding benchmark among open models (77.8% SWE-bench). 50.4% on Humanity's Last Exam. MIT license with no usage restrictions.

items.title: GPT-5.4 Thinking
items.summary: Extended thinking mode of GPT-5.4 for the hardest problems. Uses chain-of-thought reasoning for math, science, and complex analysis. Successor to the o1/o3 reasoning line.
items.content_text: Extended thinking mode of GPT-5.4 for the hardest problems. Uses chain-of-thought reasoning for math, science, and complex analysis. Successor to the o1/o3 reasoning line.

items.title: GPT-5.4
items.summary: OpenAI's flagship model combining frontier reasoning, coding, and agentic capabilities. Unifies the best of GPT-5.3-Codex into a single model with 45% fewer hallucinations than GPT-4o.
items.content_text: OpenAI's flagship model combining frontier reasoning, coding, and agentic capabilities. Unifies the best of GPT-5.3-Codex into a single model with 45% fewer hallucinations than GPT-4o.

items.title: GPT-OSS-120B
items.summary: OpenAI's first fully open-weight LLMs since GPT-2. Matches or surpasses o4-mini on core benchmarks. Can run on a single 80GB GPU. Optimized for vLLM, llama.cpp, and Ollama.
items.content_text: OpenAI's first fully open-weight LLMs since GPT-2. Matches or surpasses o4-mini on core benchmarks. Can run on a single 80GB GPU. Optimized for vLLM, llama.cpp, and Ollama.

items.title: Grok 4.1
items.summary: xAI's flagship model with 65% fewer hallucinations than its predecessor (down to 4.22%). Available in both Thinking and Non-thinking configurations.
items.content_text: xAI's flagship model with 65% fewer hallucinations than its predecessor (down to 4.22%). Available in both Thinking and Non-thinking configurations.

items.title: Grok 4.20
items.summary: xAI's latest flagship with the lowest hallucination rate of any model (78% Omniscience) and #1 instruction following (83% IFBench). Features a novel multi-agent architecture and 2M token context window. 248 tokens/second output speed.
items.content_text: xAI's latest flagship with the lowest hallucination rate of any model (78% Omniscience) and #1 instruction following (83% IFBench). Features a novel multi-agent architecture and 2M token context window. 248 tokens/second output speed.

items.title: Hermes 4 405B
items.summary: Nous Research's flagship open-weight model with hybrid reasoning (toggle between standard and explicit chain-of-thought with think tags). Based on Llama 3.1, trained with rejection sampling via 1,000+ task verifiers. Known for minimal content restrictions and user-directed behavior.
items.content_text: Nous Research's flagship open-weight model with hybrid reasoning (toggle between standard and explicit chain-of-thought with think tags). Based on Llama 3.1, trained with rejection sampling via 1,000+ task verifiers. Known for minimal content restrictions and user-directed behavior.

items.title: Kimi K2.5
items.summary: Chinese AI model achieving 96% on AIME 2025, outperforming most proprietary models on math. Strong reasoning and mathematical capabilities.
items.content_text: Chinese AI model achieving 96% on AIME 2025, outperforming most proprietary models on math. Strong reasoning and mathematical capabilities.

items.title: Llama 4 Maverick
items.summary: Meta's flagship open-source MoE model with 400B total parameters (17B active). Scored #2 on LMArena leaderboard (ELO 1,417). Native multimodal capabilities.
items.content_text: Meta's flagship open-source MoE model with 400B total parameters (17B active). Scored #2 on LMArena leaderboard (ELO 1,417). Native multimodal capabilities.

items.title: Llama 4 Scout
items.summary: Meta's efficient open-source MoE model with 109B total parameters (17B active). Features the largest context window of any model at 10M tokens.
items.content_text: Meta's efficient open-source MoE model with 109B total parameters (17B active). Features the largest context window of any model at 10M tokens.

items.title: MiniMax M2.7
items.summary: Third iteration of MiniMax's M2 line with tighter factual accuracy and lower cost. Intelligence index of 49.62 places it near frontier models at a fraction of the price. Open weights.
items.content_text: Third iteration of MiniMax's M2 line with tighter factual accuracy and lower cost. Intelligence index of 49.62 places it near frontier models at a fraction of the price. Open weights.

items.title: Mistral 3
items.summary: Mistral's flagship model suite with Apache 2.0 license. A European alternative focused on enterprise compliance, adopting a DeepSeek-style MoE architecture for efficiency.
items.content_text: Mistral's flagship model suite with Apache 2.0 license. A European alternative focused on enterprise compliance, adopting a DeepSeek-style MoE architecture for efficiency.

items.title: Mistral Small 3 24B
items.summary: Efficient 24B model that competes with models 2-3x its size. Apache 2.0 license. Strong for real-time applications.
items.content_text: Efficient 24B model that competes with models 2-3x its size. Apache 2.0 license. Strong for real-time applications.

items.title: Mistral Small 4
items.summary: Efficient MoE model with 119B total parameters but only 6.5B active — the knowledge capacity of a large model at the inference cost of a small one. Multimodal with hybrid reasoning. Apache 2.0 license.
items.content_text: Efficient MoE model with 119B total parameters but only 6.5B active — the knowledge capacity of a large model at the inference cost of a small one. Multimodal with hybrid reasoning. Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: Nemotron 3 Super
items.summary: NVIDIA's open-weight MoE model with 120B total parameters and 12B active. Designed to fit on hardware most companies already own. Serves as the anchor for NVIDIA's agent toolkit strategy, optimized for TensorRT-LLM and NIM.
items.content_text: NVIDIA's open-weight MoE model with 120B total parameters and 12B active. Designed to fit on hardware most companies already own. Serves as the anchor for NVIDIA's agent toolkit strategy, optimized for TensorRT-LLM and NIM.

items.title: Nemotron-Cascade 2
items.summary: NVIDIA's 30B MoE with only 3B active parameters that achieves gold-medal performance on IMO, IOI, and ICPC. Beats the larger Nemotron 3 Super 120B on coding and instruction following. Fits on a single RTX 4090 (24GB VRAM with Q4). Hybrid Mamba-2 + Transformer architecture enables a 1M token context window.
items.content_text: NVIDIA's 30B MoE with only 3B active parameters that achieves gold-medal performance on IMO, IOI, and ICPC. Beats the larger Nemotron 3 Super 120B on coding and instruction following. Fits on a single RTX 4090 (24GB VRAM with Q4). Hybrid Mamba-2 + Transformer architecture enables a 1M token context window.

items.title: Phi-4
items.summary: Microsoft's small-but-capable model using state-of-the-art training techniques and high-quality data. Punches well above its weight class despite small parameter count.
items.content_text: Microsoft's small-but-capable model using state-of-the-art training techniques and high-quality data. Punches well above its weight class despite small parameter count.

items.title: Qwen 3.5 397B-A17B
items.summary: Alibaba's generational leap. Natively multimodal, 256K context, 201 languages. The flagship 397B-A17B MoE model activates only 17B parameters per token. Apache 2.0. Most downloaded model family on HuggingFace.
items.content_text: Alibaba's generational leap. Natively multimodal, 256K context, 201 languages. The flagship 397B-A17B MoE model activates only 17B parameters per token. Apache 2.0. Most downloaded model family on HuggingFace.

items.title: Qwen 3
items.summary: Alibaba's flagship open model family. Overtook Llama as the most-downloaded model family on HuggingFace in late 2025. Hybrid reasoning with think/non-think modes. 119 languages supported.
items.content_text: Alibaba's flagship open model family. Overtook Llama as the most-downloaded model family on HuggingFace in late 2025. Hybrid reasoning with think/non-think modes. 119 languages supported.

items.title: SmolLM3 3B
items.summary: Fully open instruct and reasoning model with unprecedented transparency — Hugging Face published the complete engineering blueprint. Outperforms Llama-3.2-3B and Qwen2.5-3B at the 3B scale.
items.content_text: Fully open instruct and reasoning model with unprecedented transparency — Hugging Face published the complete engineering blueprint. Outperforms Llama-3.2-3B and Qwen2.5-3B at the 3B scale.

items.title: Yi-1.5 34B
items.summary: Strong bilingual (English/Chinese) model from 01.AI that competes with much larger models on benchmarks. Excellent reasoning and code generation at a deployable 34B size. Apache 2.0 license.
items.content_text: Strong bilingual (English/Chinese) model from 01.AI that competes with much larger models on benchmarks. Excellent reasoning and code generation at a deployable 34B size. Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: AI Agent Platforms
items.summary: Directory of AI agent platforms — personal agents, developer frameworks, orchestration tools, coding agents, and no-code builders.
items.content_text: Directory of AI agent platforms — personal agents, developer frameworks, orchestration tools, coding agents, and no-code builders.

items.title: Anthropic Agent SDK
items.summary: Tool-use-first approach to building agents with Claude. Features extended thinking for complex reasoning, computer use capabilities, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for standardized tool discovery and integration.
items.content_text: Tool-use-first approach to building agents with Claude. Features extended thinking for complex reasoning, computer use capabilities, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for standardized tool discovery and integration.

items.title: AutoGen
items.summary: Microsoft's multi-agent framework where agents collaborate, share information, and perform tasks autonomously. Designed for flexible, scalable multi-agent conversations with support for human participation.
items.content_text: Microsoft's multi-agent framework where agents collaborate, share information, and perform tasks autonomously. Designed for flexible, scalable multi-agent conversations with support for human participation.

items.title: Claude Code
items.summary: Anthropic's terminal-based coding agent, ranked #1 on SWE-bench with 80.8% resolution rate. Operates with 1M token context window, enabling full-codebase understanding. Included in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans.
items.content_text: Anthropic's terminal-based coding agent, ranked #1 on SWE-bench with 80.8% resolution rate. Operates with 1M token context window, enabling full-codebase understanding. Included in Claude Pro and Max subscription plans.

items.title: CrewAI
items.summary: Multi-agent collaboration framework where you define agent roles, connect tools, and monitor performance. Offers both visual and API-driven interfaces with built-in orchestration, observability, and scaling capabilities.
items.content_text: Multi-agent collaboration framework where you define agent roles, connect tools, and monitor performance. Offers both visual and API-driven interfaces with built-in orchestration, observability, and scaling capabilities.

items.title: Devin
items.summary: Cognition AI's autonomous software engineer that can plan projects end-to-end, write code, debug issues, and deploy applications. Operates in its own development environment with browser, terminal, and editor access.
items.content_text: Cognition AI's autonomous software engineer that can plan projects end-to-end, write code, debug issues, and deploy applications. Operates in its own development environment with browser, terminal, and editor access.

items.title: GitHub Copilot Agent Mode
items.summary: Autonomous multi-step coding mode within VS Code and JetBrains IDEs. Plans and executes complex coding tasks including multi-file edits, terminal commands, and iterative debugging within your existing development environment.
items.content_text: Autonomous multi-step coding mode within VS Code and JetBrains IDEs. Plans and executes complex coding tasks including multi-file edits, terminal commands, and iterative debugging within your existing development environment.

items.title: Google ADK
items.summary: Google's Agent Development Kit for building AI agents. Integrates tightly with Gemini models and Google Cloud services, offering a streamlined path from prototype to production within the Google ecosystem.
items.content_text: Google's Agent Development Kit for building AI agents. Integrates tightly with Gemini models and Google Cloud services, offering a streamlined path from prototype to production within the Google ecosystem.

items.title: Hermes Agent
items.summary: Nous Research's open-source autonomous agent with persistent multi-level memory and auto-skill generation. Supports 5 execution backends (Local, Docker, SSH, Singularity, Modal) and multi-channel communication across Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, and Signal.
items.content_text: Nous Research's open-source autonomous agent with persistent multi-level memory and auto-skill generation. Supports 5 execution backends (Local, Docker, SSH, Singularity, Modal) and multi-channel communication across Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, and Signal.

items.title: LangGraph
items.summary: Graph-based multi-agent orchestration framework by the LangChain team. Enables stateful workflows with cycles, persistence, and human-in-the-loop patterns. The most searched agent framework with 27,100 monthly searches.
items.content_text: Graph-based multi-agent orchestration framework by the LangChain team. Enables stateful workflows with cycles, persistence, and human-in-the-loop patterns. The most searched agent framework with 27,100 monthly searches.

items.title: Mastra
items.summary: TypeScript-first agent framework built by the team behind Gatsby. Features built-in model routing, RAG pipelines, memory management, and MCP integration, designed for developers who prefer the TypeScript ecosystem.
items.content_text: TypeScript-first agent framework built by the team behind Gatsby. Features built-in model routing, RAG pipelines, memory management, and MCP integration, designed for developers who prefer the TypeScript ecosystem.

items.title: n8n
items.summary: Open-source workflow automation platform with AI agent capabilities. Features LangChain integration, vector database support, and a visual workflow builder. Available as self-hosted or cloud deployment.
items.content_text: Open-source workflow automation platform with AI agent capabilities. Features LangChain integration, vector database support, and a visual workflow builder. Available as self-hosted or cloud deployment.

items.title: OpenAI Agents SDK
items.summary: Production-grade agent toolkit from OpenAI, replacing the earlier Swarm project. Core abstractions include handoffs between agents with full conversation context, built-in guardrails, and tracing for debugging and monitoring.
items.content_text: Production-grade agent toolkit from OpenAI, replacing the earlier Swarm project. Core abstractions include handoffs between agents with full conversation context, built-in guardrails, and tracing for debugging and monitoring.

items.title: OpenClaw
items.summary: Free, open-source personal AI agent and the fastest-growing OSS project in history. Multi-channel messaging across WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, and more. Features a skills marketplace with 4,000+ community skills, local-first privacy, voice support, and multi-agent routing.
items.content_text: Free, open-source personal AI agent and the fastest-growing OSS project in history. Multi-channel messaging across WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, Discord, and more. Features a skills marketplace with 4,000+ community skills, local-first privacy, voice support, and multi-agent routing.

items.title: Paperclip
items.summary: Open-source orchestration platform for "zero-human companies." Agents are organized as a company hierarchy (CEO, Engineers, QA) with budget enforcement, persistent state, governance with rollback, multi-company isolation, and a full audit trail. Gained 30K stars in just 3 weeks.
items.content_text: Open-source orchestration platform for "zero-human companies." Agents are organized as a company hierarchy (CEO, Engineers, QA) with budget enforcement, persistent state, governance with rollback, multi-company isolation, and a full audit trail. Gained 30K stars in just 3 weeks.
